feature_name: PRD to deck and executive story

scenarios.title: Generate the promoted docs-and-deck package from the repo baseline
scenarios.summary: The presentation package now reuses persisted story, render, and publish outputs as the governed docs-and-deck path from PRD to stakeholder-ready communication.

truthfulness_summary: The presentation slice now scores from persisted story, render, and publish artifacts, so stakeholder communication can be treated as a real governed output rather than a bundle-local narration.

dimension_scores.rationale: The repo now packages the approved PRD and doc bundle into a stakeholder-ready deck without a separate PM slide-building pass.
The story, render spec, and audience policy now act as the promoted next-version deck path for the reference workspace.
Publish checks, export planning, and the bounded completion gate now all agree the deck path is stable for the promoted baseline.
The aligned path keeps the right manual approval boundary while still behaving like a real PM superpower inside the repo.
The same governed docs-and-deck path now ships as part of the repeatable next-version baseline rather than a one-off communication proof.

reviewer_verdict.summary: The presentation package is now backed by persisted story, render, and publish artifacts and can count as the governed communication standard for the bounded baseline.

tester_verdict.summary: Generation and publish checks now validate against persisted presentation artifacts, so the docs-and-deck path clears the bounded proof bar.

manual_verdict.summary: Keep using the persisted story, render, and publish artifacts as the standard communication proof path.

next_action: Keep the persisted docs-and-deck outputs as the standard communication proof path and refresh them after meaningful product changes.
